channel.title: Maine Board of Overseers of the Bar — General News
channel.description: No dedicated news archive exists; the homepage's 'News' section is irregular free-text with no per-item dates or stable structure, so this is monitored by full-page fingerprint rather than per-item extraction.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Board of Overseers of the Bar — General News
item.description: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
